title: FAA — 业务操守、监管权力与罪行 / Conduct, Powers & Offences
summary: FAA 规定业务操守(披露重要信息、不得虚假误导、推荐有合理基础),赋予 MAS 监管/执法权;违反可构成罪行。 / The FAA sets conduct standards (disclose material information, no false/misleading statements, reasonable basis), gives MAS regulatory/enforcement powers, and makes breaches an offence.

sections.heading: 业务操守要求
sections.body: 须披露风险/费用/利益冲突等重要信息;不得作虚假或误导陈述诱使交易;推荐须有合理基础且适合客户。

sections.heading: Conduct requirements
sections.body: Disclose material information (risks, fees, conflicts); make no false or misleading statements to induce transactions; recommend with a reasonable basis and suitability.

sections.heading: MAS 权力与罪行
sections.body: MAS 可检查、调查并采取监管/执法行动(指令、限制、暂停/撤销牌照、禁业);无牌或虚假陈述属罪行,可罚款/监禁。

sections.heading: MAS powers & offences
sections.body: MAS may inspect, investigate and take regulatory/enforcement action (directions, restrictions, suspension/revocation, prohibition); unlicensed activity or false statements are offences (fines/imprisonment).

keyPoints: 披露重要信息、不得误导 / Disclose material info; do not mislead
推荐须有合理基础 / Recommendations need a reasonable basis
MAS 有检查/调查/执法权 / MAS may inspect/investigate/enforce
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act — Conduct of Business, Powers & Offences
